goal: Let users find or add games beyond the current seed catalog while keeping metadata, price, cover, and subscription confidence explicit.

sources.label: Seed catalog
sources.note: Searches games already promoted into data/games.json.

sources.label: Catalog backbone
sources.note: Searches curated candidates not yet promoted into the seed catalog.

sources.label: Prototype external index
sources.note: 117-record offline stand-in for a future RAWG/IGDB/provider lookup, with alias and token-coverage search support.

sources.label: Manual unverified title
sources.note: Allows any typed title to enter wishlist memory before metadata is resolved.

sources.label: RAWG provider hook
sources.note: Optional local provider endpoint. Uses RAWG when RAWG_API_KEY is present, keeps fixture fallback otherwise, and treats returned images as attributed candidates rather than verified official covers.
